calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Eharing For Courtjudgment By Default
Off Calendar Mar-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Barry K. Tagawa, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, The Law Office of Barry K. Tagawa, A Professional Corporation.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Hausmann-Alain Banet, Hausman-Alain Banet, aka Hausmann Alain Banet, aka Ousmann-Alain Gbane, aka Ousmann Alain Gbane.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 20 dismissed without prejudice.
Barry K. Tagawa, sworn and examinded on his own behalf
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $25,850.42
Pre-Judgment Interest: $6,380.76
Costs: $695.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $32,926.18
Other: The court finds that Plaintiff has produced sufficient evidence proving each and every essential element of the causes of action for breach of contract and fraud.
Judgment signed in open court.
